scripts.audit:seo-stack: npm run audit:seo-aeo && npm run audit:lighthouse
scripts.visuals: npm run visual-maps:build && sh -c 'cd docs/visual-maps/dist && (sleep 1; open http://127.0.0.1:4184) & python3 -m http.server 4184 --bind 127.0.0.1'
scripts.visual-maps:build: sh -c 'rm -rf docs/visual-maps/dist public/visual-maps && likec4 build docs/visual-maps --output docs/visual-maps/dist --base /visual-maps/ && cp -R docs/visual-maps/dist public/visual-maps'
scripts.visual-maps:export-portfolio: sh -c 'rm -rf public/portfolio/likec4-light public/portfolio/likec4-dark && mkdir -p public/portfolio/likec4-light public/portfolio/likec4-dark && likec4 export png docs/visual-maps --light --flat -o public/portfolio/likec4-light -f ai_workflow_readme_map -f scouting_coordinator_bucket_map -f resume_timeline_map -f review_first_implementation_loop -t 45 --max-attempts 3 && likec4 export png docs/visual-maps --dark --flat -o public/portfolio/likec4-dark -f ai_workflow_readme_map -f scouting_coordinator_bucket_map -f resume_timeline_map -f review_first_implementation_loop -t 45 --max-attempts 3 && node scripts/generate-likec4-artifact-svgs.mjs'
